message:
refactor(determinism): establish binary serialization for all content hashing

Replace string-based and format!("{:?}") hash computations with explicit
binary serialization helpers across all content-hashing modules. This
ensures cryptographic reproducibility by using fixed-width LE/BE byte
representations with length-prefixed strings.

Major refactoring:
- causal_replay: add append_u8/u64/i64/len_prefixed/string/optional_string
  helpers for NondeterminismLog and DecisionSnapshot content_hash()
- release_gate: replace string digest with binary-safe append_verdict,
  append_gate_check_result, append_gate_event helpers
- hook_effect_contract: add deterministic enum-to-binary serialization for
  HookKind, RenderPhase, EffectTiming, LegalTransformation, etc.
- hostcall_telemetry: standardize canonical_bytes() with binary helpers
- law_proof_refutation: replace Debug formatting with serde_json for
  deterministic struct representation

Hash slice safety:
- calibration_sentinel: copy hashes (Vec<[u8;32]>) instead of references
- native_addon_parity_gate: dereference content_hash slices

Additional modules updated for consistency:
- entropic_policy_morphing, escape_analysis_certificate,
  hierarchical_delta_debug, law_mining, law_promotion_pack,
  metadata_substrate_inventory, parser_api_stability,
  performance_statistical_validation, reproducibility_provenance_pack,
  runtime_image_contract, react_compile_verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
